personal.title: Full-Stack Developer & Mobile Application Specialist
personal.subtitle: Flutter | Web Development | UI Design
personal.bio: Mobile Application Developer with 5+ years of experience specializing in Flutter and cross-platform development. Expert in building scalable, high-performance applications with modern architecture patterns. Also proficient in full-stack web development, UI/UX design, and cloud deployment.
personal.shortBio: Full-Stack Developer crafting beautiful, performant mobile and web applications with modern technologies.

primary.description: Expertise in building responsive, performant cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter with Material Design and Cupertino guidelines.
Strong backend development skills with modern frameworks, scalable API design, and real-time database management.
Professional frontend development with modern frameworks, accessibility standards, and performance optimization.

projects.title: AwashZ - On-Demand Car Wash & Auto Services
projects.subtitle: Location-based mobile service platform
projects.description: Developed a comprehensive location-based mobile application enabling users to book professional car wash and auto services delivered directly to their location. The platform streamlines service scheduling, tracking, and payment processing while providing administrative tools for operational management.
projects.fullDescription: AwashZ is a production-ready mobile application built with Flutter that revolutionizes how users access car wash and auto services. The app features real-time location tracking, service provider management, secure payment processing, and comprehensive admin dashboard. Implemented push notifications via FCM for appointment reminders and service updates.
features: Real-time service booking with instant confirmation
GPS tracking and location-based service discovery
Appointment scheduling and reminders via FCM
projects.testimonial: High-performance app with smooth UX and reliable service delivery

projects.title: Glamix - Salon Booking & Appointment Management
projects.subtitle: Professional salon services discovery platform
projects.description: Developed a mobile application for discovering and booking salon and grooming services. Implemented real-time appointment scheduling with availability management and integrated secure payment options. Built features for service browsing, user reviews, and intelligent appointment reminders.
projects.fullDescription: Glamix is a sophisticated salon and grooming services marketplace app. Users can discover nearby salons, browse services, check real-time availability, and book appointments seamlessly. The app includes a comprehensive review and rating system, push notification reminders, and integrated payment processing. Service providers have access to a dedicated dashboard for managing appointments and availability.
features: Service discovery with filters and search
projects.testimonial: Intuitive interface with powerful booking management features

projects.title: Discount Plus - Digital Discounts & Membership Platform
projects.subtitle: Smart discount aggregation and digital membership system
projects.description: Developed a discount aggregation platform allowing users to discover offers from nearby businesses and redeem them using QR code and barcode-based digital membership. Implemented real-time data synchronization using Firebase with user activity tracking.
projects.fullDescription: Discount Plus is an innovative mobile platform that bridges the gap between businesses and consumers. Users discover and redeem exclusive offers from nearby merchants using digital membership cards and barcode scanning. The platform features real-time offer synchronization, comprehensive activity tracking, savings insights, and secure authentication. Businesses benefit from detailed analytics and customer engagement tools.
projects.testimonial: Seamless user experience with powerful real-time data synchronization
